---
title: "Projects"
---

This section presents a selection of Python-based projects that demonstrate my ability to **analyse data, interpret results, and communicate insights effectively through code and visualisations**.

::: {.callout-important}
Each project follows a structured approach, including **objectives, implementation, interpretation, and reflection**, reflecting practical data analysis and problem-solving skills.
:::

## My Projects

::: {.section-card}
### 📊 Student Performance Analysis

**Objective:**  
To analyse the relationship between study time and academic performance.

**Overview:**  
This project uses Python to organise and analyse data, applying visualisation techniques to identify trends and support conclusions.

**Key Features:**
- Data organisation using Pandas  
- Trend analysis and interpretation  
- Visualisation using Matplotlib  

**Tools:** Python, Pandas, Matplotlib  

[View Project →](list/project-1.html)
:::

::: {.section-card}
### 💰 Monthly Budget Analysis

**Objective:**  
To analyse how monthly expenses are distributed and identify key spending patterns.

**Overview:**  
This project applies data analysis techniques to financial data, using visualisation to present how income is allocated across categories.

**Key Features:**
- Structured financial data analysis  
- Visualisation of spending distribution  
- Interpretation of budget allocation  

**Tools:** Python, Pandas, Matplotlib  

[View Project →](list/project-2.html)
:::
